summary: Frontend-only testing for Proactive Alert Cards expand/collapse functionality. All 6 features tested and verified working: Cards clickable to expand, Ask Mira button visible on expand, Book Now button visible on expand, Ask Mira sends contextual message, Book Now sends service request, Cards collapse when clicked again.

ui_bugs.issue: Minor: 'Reminder: undefined for Mojo. Shall I help schedule?' message showing - the proactive greeting has undefined text

issues: Overall design is good - clear urgency colors (red for critical, orange for high, yellow for medium), good card layout with proper spacing

action_items: Fix proactive greeting text that shows 'undefined' - check the data source for greeting message
critical_code_review_comments: ProactiveAlertCard component (lines 57-204) correctly implements expand/collapse with isExpanded state and toggle on click
data-testid attributes properly set: alert-{id}, ask-mira-{id}, book-now-{id}, dismiss-{id}
WelcomeHero.jsx (lines 207-226) correctly passes onAskMira and onBookNow handlers that trigger handleQuickReply
Action buttons correctly call setIsExpanded(false) after action to collapse the card
Urgency styling correctly applied: critical=red with pulse, high=orange, medium=yellow, low=blue
seed_data_creation: None - used real pet data with existing proactive alerts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proactive Alert Cards fully tested. Features verified: 1) Cards expand on click showing Ask Mira and Book Now buttons, 2) Cards collapse on second click or after action button click, 3) Ask Mira sends contextual message about the alert (e.g., grooming), 4) Book Now sends concierge request, 5) Dismiss buttons present. Note: /mira-demo page can crash browser on screenshots - navigate via Ask Mira button from dashboard for stability.

card_expand_on_click.details: Clicking grooming alert card expanded to show Ask Mira and Book Now buttons

ask_mira_click_sends_message.details: Clicking Ask Mira on grooming card sent message 'When should Mojo get groomed next?' and Mira responded with grooming advice

book_now_click_sends_request.details: Clicking Book Now sends service request to Concierge

card_collapse_on_second_click.details: After first click buttons visible (true), after second click buttons hidden (false)
